beIN SPORTS 7.title: Day 1 - ATP 250 Millennium Estoril Open 2026
beIN SPORTS 7.desc: The Millennium Estoril Open 2026 marks the tournament’s return to ATP 250 status in Portugal, running from 20 to 26 July in Estoril. Played on clay, it stands as the country’s only ATP Tour event, bringing international players to one of Portugal’s leading tennis stages.
